holdings.infoBox: EWUS is an equity ETF with a total of 206 individual holdings. The top holdings are Diploma stock at 2.70%, Beazley at 2.15%, IMI plc at 2.01%, Games Workshop Group at 1.87%, and IG Group Holdings at 1.82%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI United Kingdom Small Cap ETF (EWUS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI United Kingdom Small Cap index, a market-cap-weighted index of small-cap United Kingdom companies. EWUS was launched on Jan 25, 2012 and is issued by BlackRock.
